Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables. A welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule was broadcast over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards. Furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.
Additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, career counselors reminded attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.
A welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule was broadcast over the PA system.
At the entrance, event staff scanned registrations and handed out lanyards.
Furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.
